title: OreUI recreation (java)
description: OreUI porting tests on java using Polytone
body:
### **_[REQUIRES POLYTONE](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone)_**

A quick pack to test out polytone's slot modifiers. Replicates the [found](https://x.com/xKingDarkYT/status/1873038637899890855) bedrock OreUI's inventory tests by manually moving the slots around.

Current issues:  
- Picking items outside of the regular inventory bounds will throw them away. Doesnt happen when placing items. Work around is using the number row to move them. 
- The titles appear behind the ui    
- chests, ender chests and barrels use the same ui. Nothing i can do about it with how polytone works atm
